title: malva cisplatina
intro:
Malva cisplatina is not a known plant species, however Malva sylvestris or "Mallow" is a plant species that might be the one you are referring to, if so here's the paragraph:

 Malva cisplatina is not a known plant species. However, Malva sylvestris, commonly known as mallow, is a plant with medicinal properties. The leaves and roots of Malva sylvestris have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and soothing effects, making it beneficial for digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Malva sylvestris can be found in teas, infusions, salves, and creams, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, eczema, and bronchitis.
